query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Connecticut State Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed first-party district-owned education-routing leaves for one district in each Connecticut county.

samples.sample_name: Fairfield Public Schools Special Education (Fairfield County)
samples.evidence_snippet: The Fairfield County district-owned page resolves as Special Education - Fairfield Public Schools and preserves district special-education routing, referral, and procedural-safeguards language on the district domain.

samples.sample_name: Hartford Public Schools Special Education (Hartford County)
samples.evidence_snippet: The Hartford County district-owned page resolves as Special Education | Hartford Public Schools on the district domain and provides direct district-owned education-routing context.

samples.sample_name: Torrington Public Schools Special Education (Litchfield County)
samples.evidence_snippet: The Litchfield County district-owned page resolves as Special Education - Torrington Public Schools inside the Student Services section and preserves district-owned routing language.

samples.sample_name: Middletown Public Schools Special Education & Pupil Services (Middlesex County)
samples.evidence_snippet: The Middlesex County district-owned page resolves as Special Education & Pupil Services | Middletown Public Schools and preserves direct district routing for the local pupil-services office.

samples.sample_name: New Haven Public Schools Office of Special Education & Student Services (New Haven County)
samples.evidence_snippet: The New Haven County district-owned page resolves as Office of Special Education & Student Services | New Haven Public Schools and preserves a direct district-owned routing office title.

samples.sample_name: Norwich Public Schools Student Services & Special Education (New London County)
samples.evidence_snippet: The New London County district-owned page resolves as Student Services & Special Education - Norwich Public Schools and preserves direct district routing language.

samples.sample_name: Vernon Public Schools Office of Pupil Services (Tolland County)
samples.evidence_snippet: The Tolland County district-owned page resolves as Office of Pupil Services | Vernon Public Schools and preserves the district-controlled local routing office on the district domain.

samples.sample_name: Windham Public Schools Pupil Services (Windham County)
samples.evidence_snippet: The Windham County district-owned page resolves as Pupil Services | Windham Public Schools and preserves a district-owned local routing department page on the district domain.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Connecticut evidence on disk explicitly preserves Connecticut Protection and Advocacy designation text.

samples.evidence_snippet: DRCT is Connecticut's designated Protection & Advocacy System for individuals with disabilities in Connecticut.

query_basis: Reviewed live first-party CPAC About page now explicitly preserves Parent Training and Information Center designation text for Connecticut statewide family support.

samples.sample_name: Connecticut Parent Advocacy Center PTI About page
samples.evidence_snippet: Beth is also the Director of CPAC's federally funded Parent Training and Information (PTI) Center project.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Connecticut evidence on disk explicitly preserves statewide legally based advocacy services plus direct help-routing pages.

samples.evidence_snippet: DRCT, together with other state Protection & Advocacy agencies, make up the nation’s largest provider of legally based advocacy services for people with disabilities.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-22 live official DDS Regions hub plus the North, South, and West general-contact leaves and derived a county-to-region routing map from the counties-served text on the hub.
